# 07/03 Fixes 2

Date: 2026-03-07

## Collaboration detail image gallery improvements

- Kept the collaboration detail banner text-only again so attached images no longer sit inside the hero area.
- Split collaboration attachments into image media and non-image downloads so screenshots are treated like gallery content instead of plain file links.
- Added a dedicated gallery section to the collaboration detail page with a large selected-image preview.
- Added clickable thumbnail switching for multiple images.
- Added previous/next controls and an "Open Full Image" action.
- Added image filename and size metadata under the preview.
- Centralized the preferred cover-image logic in a shared collaboration media utility so list cards, moderation cards, and the detail view all resolve thumbnails consistently.
- Tightened the gallery footprint after review so the image viewer feels more compact and does not dominate the page width.
- Fixed thumbnail rail sizing so normal multi-image cases do not show an unnecessary scrollbar caused by width overflow.
- Kept non-image attachments available in a separate downloads list in the detail panel.
- Verified the frontend build after each round of changes with `npm run build`.
